name: Big Bubble Pop Fizz
description: Big Bubble Pop Fizz is the SuperChargers counterpart of Pop Fizz in Skylanders: SuperChargers. His signature vehicle is the Soda Skimmer.
biography: Big Bubble Pop Fizz is the SuperChargers counterpart of Pop Fizz in Skylanders: SuperChargers. His signature vehicle is the Soda Skimmer. He has a birthday counterpart called Birthday Bash Big Bubble Pop Fizz.
personality: Pop Fizz is known for being unpredictable and scatterbrained due to his many potion experiments. He is often seen enthusiastically testing new formulas, even if they have strange side effects on his memory or appearance. As he says, 'sometimes these potions can be a little -- uh, unpredictable.'

story.content: Big Bubble Pop Fizz is the SuperChargers counterpart of Pop Fizz in Skylanders: SuperChargers. His signature vehicle is the Soda Skimmer. He continues his alchemical experimentation with a new bubble-blowing sousaphone weapon, using his concoctions to transform into a powerful beast.

content: Umm... I think it was supposed to make my memory better, but I forgot -- AHHGGHH!!
Like I always say Buzz, you gotta always be prepared! AGHHH (snort)
Thanks, Buzz. We really like to mix it up.
Yeah, Buzz. I'm ready to put my potions in motion.
Thanks, Buzz... Cuz, sometimes these potions can be a little -- uh, unpredictable.

trivia: Despite the artwork depiction, Big Bubble Pop Fizz doesn't carry a beaker in-game.
Unlike his previous versions, Big Bubble Pop Fizz can remain in his Beast mode limitlessly.
His Beast mode now has three different colors based on whichever ability he possesses.
The figure's hair is not colored at the back, under his sousaphone-like weapon.

When he, Deep Dive Gill Grunt, Super Shot Stealth Elf and Bone Bash Roller Brawl are placed on the portal, they say their official catchphrases and some of their quotes in a slightly different tone of their voices. This also applies to most of their quotes, which have been completely re-recorded.

In SuperChargers, there is a glitch that can make Big Bubble Pop Fizz have his berserker stance, even when he's in his normal mode. This is done by changing his upgrade path while he's still in his berserker form. His idle and running animations are the same as berserker form, but his attacks are otherwise normal.

trailers.name: Skylanders SuperChargers - Big Bubble Pop Fizz's Soul Gem Preview (The Motion of the Potion)

gameplay: Big Bubble Pop Fizz uses a sousaphone-like weapon to blow bubbles that bounce on their way to enemies. He can transform into a beast by pressing Attack 2, where he uses claws for melee attacks. His SuperCharger form allows him to stay in beast mode indefinitely. He uses a Mixture Modifier to transform the color and effects of liquid attacks. After reverting to normal form, he receives a temporary defense boost.

basic.name: Bubble Blast
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to blow bubbles that bounce on their way to enemies.

basic.name: Bubbling Beast Form
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to transform into a beast. Press Attack 1 to attack nearby enemies with claws.

basic_upgrades.name: Mixture Modifier
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to cause a chemical reaction and transform the color and effects of liquid attacks.

basic_upgrades.name: Know Your Bases
basic_upgrades.content: All base liquid attacks do more damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Genetic Engineering
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 while in beast mode to perform new attacks depending on the liquid color.

basic_upgrades.name: Side Effects
basic_upgrades.content: After reverting to normal Pop Fizz mode, gain a temporary defense boost.

soulgems.name: Spiked Punch!
soulgems.content: While in beast mode, hold and release Attack 1 to pound the ground and knock all enemies in the area up!

abilities.name: Larger Lungs
abilities.content: Hold Attack 1 to perform improved liquid attacks depending on the current color.

abilities.name: For Science!
abilities.content: Hold Attack 3 while in normal form to constantly spew liquids that damage enemies in the nearby area.

abilities.name: Follow The Formula
abilities.content: Mixture Modifier gains additional effects depending upon the liquid color.

abilities.name: Better Beast
abilities.content: Hold Attack 3 to perform enhanced and longer versions of unique beast attacks.

abilities.name: Juiced Up!
abilities.content: Melee attacks in Beast Form do more damage. I'm a monster, rawr!

abilities.name: Feed The Beast
abilities.content: In Beast Mode, hold Attack 3 to perform Better Beast attacks. Press Attack 1 after using a Better Beast attack to do more damage with your claws.

variants.variant_name: Birthday Bash Big Bubble Pop Fizz
